parameters.name: nocodb_list_bases
parameters.description: List all NocoDB bases (databases) with their IDs. Use this first to discover available bases, then use nocodb_list_tables with a base ID.

parameters.name: nocodb_list_tables
parameters.description: List all tables in a NocoDB base. Parameters: base_id (required, base ID from nocodb_list_bases)

parameters.name: nocodb_list_records
parameters.description: List records from a NocoDB table. Parameters: table_id (required, table ID from nocodb_list_tables), limit (max records, default 25), offset (skip N records), where (filter like '(Status,eq,Active)'), sort (field name, prefix with '-' for descending), fields (comma-separated field names)

value.limit: ={{ $fromAI('limit', 'Max records to return or empty string for default 25', 'string') }}
value.offset: ={{ $fromAI('offset', 'Number of records to skip or empty string', 'string') }}
value.where: ={{ $fromAI('where', 'NocoDB filter expression like (Status,eq,Active) or empty string', 'string') }}
value.sort: ={{ $fromAI('sort', 'Sort field with optional - prefix for descending or empty string', 'string') }}
value.fields: ={{ $fromAI('fields', 'Comma-separated field names or empty string for all', 'string') }}

parameters.name: nocodb_get_record
parameters.description: Get a single record from a NocoDB table by ID. Parameters: table_id (required), record_id (required, the row ID)

parameters.name: nocodb_create_record
parameters.description: Create a new record in a NocoDB table. Parameters: table_id (required), data (required, JSON string of field:value pairs like '{"Name":"John","Email":"john@example.com"}')

parameters.name: nocodb_update_record
parameters.description: Update an existing record in a NocoDB table. Parameters: table_id (required), record_id (required), data (required, JSON string of fields to update like '{"Status":"Done"}')

schema.description: JSON string of fields to update

parameters.name: nocodb_delete_record
parameters.description: Delete a record from a NocoDB table. Parameters: table_id (required), record_id (required)
